_comment: Starter project settings. The hooks are the auto-safety-net from thirty-aye. Adjust the typecheck command per stack (see below). settings.json is team-shared/committed; settings.local.json is gitignored.

hooks.comment: Auto-typecheck after editing source. TS shown; for Python swap to: ruff check / mypy on *.py.
hooks.command: FILE="${CLAUDE_FILE_PATH:-}"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -30; fi

hooks.comment: Secret-scan staged changes before you walk away. No-op if gitleaks not installed.
